Video.summary: Women and Heart Disease with Dr. Frederick Chaleff, Car Seat Proper Setting with Lt. Tony Armijo, Bad Breath with Dr. Jorge Blanco
Video.title: Smart Life S1E18

Video.summary: Admissions tells a transformational tale about what it takes to find lasting peace.
Video.title: Admissions

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Derek Rydall, a best-selling author, transformational leader, and coach. He believes we have an inexhaustible source of wisdom that is available to us all. If we can stop & be still, we can learn that the answers are within us.
Video.title: The Aware Show - Hypnotic Wealth Spells

Image.alt: The Aware Show - Hypnotic Wealth Spells
The Aware Show - Hypnotic Wealth Spells
The Aware Show - Hypnotic Wealth Spells

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Michael Schauch about his adventure. He set out to conquer a mountain in the Himalayas that he had only seen in photos but a chance meeting in Nepal led him to form a foundation that supports education of youth in that region.
Video.title: The Aware Show - A Story of Karma

Image.alt: The Aware Show - A Story of Karma
The Aware Show - A Story of Karma
The Aware Show - A Story of Karma

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with inspirational speaker Kute Blackson, who shares his journey of learning to listen to the quiet inner voice and truly walking in trust. His latest book is ôThe Magic of Surrender.ö
Video.title: The Aware Show - The Magic of Surrender

Image.alt: The Aware Show - The Magic of Surrender
The Aware Show - The Magic of Surrender
The Aware Show - The Magic of Surrender

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with Dr. Dain Heer, co-founder of Access Consciousness. Many of us suffer from a feeling of having to please others or conform to outside pressures. He shares his ideas on how to live authentically & his new book ôBody Whispering.ö
Video.title: The Aware Show - Being You!

Video.summary: Lisa Garr talks with anti-aging experts Debra Poneman and Ronnie Newman about the importance of lowering stress for health and vitality. They also share simple meditation exercises and healthy recipes.
Video.title: The Aware Show - The Art of Anti-Aging

Image.alt: The Aware Show - The Art of Anti-Aging
The Aware Show - The Art of Anti-Aging
The Aware Show - The Art of Anti-Aging

Video.summary: Sex and Exercise Research with Lia Jiannine, PHd
Video.title: Smart Life S1E15

Video.summary: Reducing Cardiovascular Risks with Dr. Jonathan Fialkow, Ask the Expert with Dr. Ricardo Castrellon, Cancer Fatigue & Exercise with Ginelle Ruffa
Video.title: Smart Life S1E16

Video.summary: Physical Activity & Kids with Dr. Scarlet Constant, Avoiding Childhood Obesity with Dr. Scarlet Constant
Video.title: Smart Life S1E17

Video.summary: Meet the contestants and learn the first of Brianĺs 5 step House Hacking formula.
Video.title: EP 1 - Location Location Location

Video.summary: Learn why using properties you donĺt own can be so lucrative.
Video.title: EP 2 - Other People's Property

Video.summary: The contestants prepare to make a place livable before guests arrive.
Video.title: EP 3 - We Have Company

Video.summary: Itĺs time to make the property listing live on the site and accept bookings.
Video.title: EP 4 - Flip the Switch

Video.summary: Find out which contestant is named the winner and becomes Brianĺs new business partner.
Video.title: EP 5 - The Finale

Video.summary: Day 6 of Teaching the Teachers reminds us that our worth comes from God, not success or recognition. True stature comes from grounding in whatĺs real, not clicks or followers. Teaching and service require integrity, generosity, and deep preparationŚgiving fully whether paid or not.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 6

Video.summary: Day 7 of Teaching the Teachers addresses money, creativity, and service without guilt. Charging fairly is not unspiritual, and true integrity means showing up fully regardless of audience. Mastery comes through patience and practice, while real success flows from serving others for the right reasons.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 7

Video.summary: Day 8 of Teaching the Teachers explores finding your authentic voice through service, humility, and receptivity. True power comes from emptying the ego, speaking on behalf of others, and showing up with spiritual impeccability. Teaching requires presence, strength, and keeping the focus on those you serve.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 8

Video.summary: Day 9 of Teaching the Teachers emphasizes that every relationship is purposeful and offers an opportunity for growth. From brief encounters to lifelong assignments, relationships train us in love, grace, and righteous living. Even when physical proximity ends, the learning of the relationship remains.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 9

Video.summary: Day 10 of teaching the Teachers challenges spiritual bypassing in social and political life. True spirituality does not avoid suffering but responds with love rather than fear. Adults are called to rethink inherited dogma, discern truth from distortion, and engage the world from higher consciousness.
Video.grandparentTitle: Teaching the Teachers with Marianne Williamson
Video.title: Teaching the Teachers - Day 10

Video.summary: In our very first solo episode of Rooted in Wellness, we explore the transformative power of being anchored like a sturdy treeŚsteady, grounded, and unwavering amidst life's storms. We'll illuminate how feeling rooted manifests as inner peace, emotional stability, and a profound connection with yourself and the world around you.
Video.title: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Image.alt: 1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness
1. 5 Ways to Become Rooted in Wellness

Video.summary: Have you ever felt like your hormones are playing a tune out of sync with your well-being? Chances are, they probably are. The good news? There's a transformative journey waiting for women when they realign with nature, pay attention to their meals, and practice intermittent fasting the right way.
Video.title: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Image.alt: Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices
Dr. Mindy Pelz: How to Become Hormonally Literate through Ancient Healing Practices

Video.summary: Did you know that your metabolic health and energy are controlled by our modern food? This means your metabolism is not broken! You just need to work on healing your metabolism through simple lifestyle shifts you can easily apply to your life today.How? This is what we dive into in this episode of Rooted in Wellness with Casey Means.
Video.title: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Image.alt: Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom
Dr. Casey Means: Finding Optimal Metabolic Health through Ancient Wisdom

Video.summary: "Play To Win" pits a group of contestants from around the world against one another for a chance to compete for a life-changing job or a six-figure coaching opportunity with the HIGDON GROUP.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode contestants not only travel from the other side of the world to compete - but they overcome some of the most horrific stories you will ever hear in your life.
Video.title: Play To Win- Episode 2

Video.summary: GIFT is a tribute to something that canĺt be measured or counted, bought or sold. An exploration of real-life gift economies, itĺs a reflection on the creative process, the reasons we labor in service of our gifts, and a celebration of the imagination.
Video.title: Episode 1
